nasb.text: But now apart from the Law the righteousness of God has been manifested, being witnessed by the Law and the Prophets,

esv.text: But now the righteousness of God has been manifested apart from the law, although the Law and the Prophets bear witness to it—

cnv.text: 現在，有律法和先知的話可以證明：　神的義在律法之外已經顯明出來，

ccb.text: 但如今，上帝的义在律法以外显明出来，有律法和众先知做见证。

csbs.text: 但如今，神的义已经在律法之外显明出来，被律法和先知们所见证，
